Changed_Other.purpose: Allows for quick identification of the current version of the code, aiding in debugging and updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in strings for faster performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces loading times and improves the responsiveness of time-related features in games.

Added_Other.name: DFStringHttpServiceOpenCloudUrlAllowlist_Staged
